text: This space feels alive with potential and tangled with complexity. Above me, the pipes and lights create a geometric tapestry, mirroring the labyrinth of thoughts in my mind. Piles of tools and parts surround me—evidence of creative assembly and the persistent chaos of invention. I feel both small among these mechanisms and invigorated by the raw energy of making, as if I am contemplating the architecture of both a workspace and my own thinking.
